name: ProSpector
description: Lead Generation GUI-Software, designed to extract business-prospects for Marketing purposes. Extraction targets are; brreg, gulesider, proff, 1881 & google. Demonstrates capabilities of: data extraction, cloud storage, authorization, dataset distrubution to users, reCAPTCHA bypass

name: Oppdrags-markedet
description: Oppdragsmarkedet.no serves as a digital marketplace for freelance work and assignments in Norway. Demonstrates capabilities of: Auth, advanced search filter, responsive design, storybook

name: Barnibus
description: Data extraction GUI-software for social media profiles (Youtube, TikTok, Instagram, SocialBlade), made for data mining. Extracts useful insights on creators such as, post rates, common color schemes, etc. Demonstrates capabilities of: Data extraction, basic API modeling, compiling .py -> .exe, python-frontend (tkinter)

name: Telegram Survailence
description: Monitoring CUI-software designed for Telegram, which activity monitors & extracts summary-data for +14k groups & channels. Which also had the option to extract the userbase and add them to your own channel. note: i have another similar app called 'Telegram_user_extraction_and_manipulation' though is only a shell, where the original was changed to private for security reasons. Demonstrates capabilities of: Data-extraction, Telethon, Multi-processing, multi-threading, PostgreSQL.

name: Leetcode Submissions
description: Library of all my personal leetcode submisstions.  Demonstrates capabilities of: code optimization, personal coding benchmarks, Dynamic Programming, Backtracking, Divide and Conquer, QuickSelect, Monotonic Stack, Math, Hash Table, Binary Search,Greedy, Bit Manipulation, Recursion, Tree, Binary tree, Array, Strng, Sorting, Two Pointers, Simulation, Stack, Linked List, Matrix

name: Fieldwire Label Printer
description: For Energy Controll AS - download selected fields for all components for a given project. note: This was a small task for a job interview. Demonstrates capabilities of: API-usage, multi-language app, CSV-download, sorting

name: Investerings Kalkulator
description: Compound interest calculator mobile app (iOS/Android) - Made for calculating and visualising the development of an investment based on compound interest. Demonstrates capabilities of: multi-platform dev, iOS/Android build and compilation, Apple/Android appstore publishing,mobile ad implementation, data visualization, cashflow, pie chart, line chart, compound-interest

name: 2Do (backend focus)
description: regular todo app - with two variants; one simpler Prisma/nextjs 16 version and one more hands-on express version. Demonstrates capabilities of: REST-ful API and API handling, Node + Express, Authentication, Database, filterlogic and similar.

name: 2Do (fornt end focus)
description: UseContext() - use the useContext and Context API to share data between components in two parts: ToDoApp and ThemeSwitcher. Demonstrates capabilities of: localstorage, context, geo-location, filterlogic.

name: GutenDex
description: App based on GutenDex api, by manipulating the very limited API i managed to create; a content-rich store front, as well as the store page and profile pages, manual dataset filtering and query due to limited API, makes simple recommendations, remembers books you've red, gets dynamicly makes a profile for popular writers w/images and have dynamic popular category section and more. Demonstrates capabilities of: caching, minor algorithmic logic, dynamic data fetching, data-scraping

name: digital resume
description: An online resume for showing to employers which also works as a code demonstration. Demonstrates capabilities of: semi-complex fronend design, thirdparty-API-usage, construction of rest-API (maybe, written before finishing app)

name: Demo business page
description: Basic demo webpage for a random business - part of a javascript course. Notable parts; dynamic bg-gradiant based on bg-picture, some fun browser manipulation w/ darkmode button, glass component with blur, displacement and masking, dynamic font sizes. Demonstrates capabilities of: pure JS, js- semi-complex frontend-solutions.

name: Cap’n
description: Evaluates marked capital of a business, based of different finance formulas (WACC) and then compares them to other competitors or similar businesses in the market. (Work in progress). Demonstrates capabilities of: more-complex math, finance knowledge,  implementation of both finance and coding, data-extraction, third-party-api

name: leetcode Tool
description: Utility scripts for downloading LeetCode problem statements and scaffolding language-specific starter files. Generates boilerplates for: Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C++. Demonstrates capabilities of: dynamic logic, dataset-generators
